Configures issue reporting and contact links for security issues and questions in the Flask GitHub repository.

# Purpose
The configuration file defines settings for managing issue reporting and community interactions for a software project hosted on GitHub. The `blank_issues_enabled` key is set to `false`, which disables the ability for users to open blank issues, encouraging them to use predefined templates instead. The `contact_links` section provides a list of resources for users to report security issues or ask questions. It includes links for reporting security issues privately, participating in GitHub Discussions for code-related queries, and joining a Discord chat for real-time assistance. These settings help streamline communication and ensure that issues and questions are directed to the appropriate channels.
